name: rubber-duck-for-codex
description: Rubber-ducking skills for checkpointed Codex reasoning and better-nearby quality checks.

interface.shortDescription: Checkpoint Codex reasoning with a quality partner.
interface.longDescription: Rubber Duck For Codex adds two skills: one to open, checkpoint, and close a rubber-ducking dialogue during non-trivial turns, and one to act as the partner that checks drafts, decisions, evidence, drift, user-request fulfillment, and whether a meaningfully better nearby answer is still available.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use rubber-ducking to pressure-test this turn.
